title: Empty catch block swallows errors silently
description: Catch blocks that contain no logging, no re-throw, and no comment explaining the suppression. Silent error swallowing masks bugs and makes diagnosis impossible. Already partially checked by SyntaxGuard (check #8) but this SIN formalises the remediation pattern.
detection_method: Regex scan for catch blocks with empty or whitespace-only bodies
preventionRule: Every catch block must either (a) log via Write-AppLog/Write-CronLog, (b) re-throw with throw, or (c) contain a comment starting with '#SIN-EXEMPT:' explaining why suppression is intentional.
remedy: Add Write-AppLog or Write-CronLog with severity Error inside the catch block. Include $_.Exception.Message in the log message.
